name: Shashlik
recipeInstructions:
1. Use cubed leg or shoulder of lamb.
2. In a large bowl, combine olive oil, chopped onion, minced garlic, salt, and ground pepper.
3. Add the marinated lamb to the bowl and stir until well coated with the marinade.
4. Place the mixture in a resealable plastic bag or an airtight container and refrigerate for at least one day.
5. Preheat the broiler.
6. Thread the marinated lamb onto skewers, if using.
7. Broil the lamb on skewers until browned all over, turning occasionally, about 8-10 minutes per side.
8. Serve with Rice Pilaf and broiled tomatoes.
